scope: ACL 2027 main PDF page 8 dense result-table caption polish

source_changes.change: Condensed Table 2 caption while preserving PASS-pair count, O/C interpretation, prompt contract, and benchmark-gate boundary.
Condensed Table 3 caption into a direct frozen-stress-set summary with canonical/diagnostic model roles and primary/diagnostic point metrics.
Replaced reviewer-closure phrasing in Table 4 caption with a reader-facing paired-CI claim-boundary description.
Kept the Table 3 generator caption synchronized with the checked-in LaTeX table.
Kept the Table 4 package generator caption synchronized with the checked-in LaTeX table.

visual_review.finding: The dense page-8 result table stack remains stable after the caption rewrite. Tables 2 through 6 stay on page 8, no table is clipped, Table 6 remains above the page number, and the shortened captions reduce repeated audit-style boundary prose while keeping the claim limits visible.
visual_review.reader_effect: The page now reads as a compact result-summary page: clean-pool control, frozen stress set, paired intervals, material-effect boundary, and official-stack stability.

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|Rerun to get|Warning:.*Label|Undefined references|multiply defined|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log || true

pdftotext paper/venues/acl27/build/main.pdf tmp/acl_main_visual_iter_20260606_round23_after/main.txt && rg -n "Table 2: Clean-pool GRScenes VLM grounding pilot on 15|Table 3: Frozen 30-pair GRScenes material-shift stress set|Table 4: Paired bootstrap confidence intervals for the frozen VLM" tmp/acl_main_visual_iter_20260606_round23_after/main.txt
verification.result: all three updated captions found in extracted PDF text

residual_risk: Focused page-8 main-paper caption-density polish only; not a full final-upload audit, supplement-wide wording cleanup, or regeneration of all experiment packages.
